bookings.note: Not a relevant conversion metric for this client — Nearly Newborn is a digital course product, not a booked service.

active_sequences.note: All sequences paused during strategic audience research period.

sequences.notes: NEW — Flagship sequence targeting baby gifters via "Crib Mattress and Bedding" purchase-intent signal. 4-step sequence, 623 contacts loaded. Ready to deploy — blocked by email reconnection. Expected to outperform baseline parent-direct messaging on opens, clicks, and course signups.

sequences.name: Legacy Expecting Parent Sequences (7 total)
sequences.notes: 7 legacy sequences from Report #1 baseline period. All paused to redirect focus toward gift-giver audience strategy.

linkedin_prosp.note: No LinkedIn/Prosp campaigns for this client.

new_this_period.name: NearlyNewborn_GifterCribIntent_Outreach_052326_v1
new_this_period.notes: Flagship sequence targeting baby gifters via "Crib Mattress and Bedding" purchase-intent signals. Sole campaign focus going forward. Expected to improve opens, clicks, and course signups vs. baseline.

new_this_period.name: Nearly Newborn — Nursery Prep Parent Sequence
new_this_period.notes: Built before audience audit was complete. Expecting-parent audience found non-viable: only ~57 real contacts under 35 (~30 female). Sequence will not be activated.

sequence_audit.summary: 9 sequences total — 7 legacy (all paused from Report #1), 1 new gift-focused (GifterCribIntent, 623 contacts), 1 deprioritized (Nursery Prep Parent, 1,004 contacts — non-viable audience). Email integration disconnected — zero sends this period. Strategic pivot to gift-only angle validated by audience research.

key_insights.title: Expecting-Parent Audience Non-Viable — Gift-Giver Angle Is the Only Path Forward
key_insights.detail: The team audited the expecting-parent audience and found it below viable threshold: after removing age 35+ contacts and failed skiptrace records, only ~57 real contacts with valid ages under 35 remained (~30 female). That's insufficient for a self-enrollment expecting-parent sequence. The Nursery Prep Parent sequence (1,004 raw contacts) was built before this audit and is now deprioritized. The decisive finding: baby gifters are the sole viable audience. The GifterCribIntent sequence (623 contacts) targets "Crib Mattress and Bedding" purchase-intent signals and represents the only path forward.

key_insights.title: Product-Aligned Audience Strategy: Gifters, Not Parents
key_insights.detail: Nearly Newborn is a digital course for new and expecting parents that can also be gifted — a key distinction from service-based MMai clients. The most natural buyer is someone looking for a meaningful baby shower or newborn gift. The GifterCribIntent sequence targets people actively searching for "Crib Mattress and Bedding" — strong intent signals that they're buying for a baby, making them ideal gift-course prospects. This gift-only angle is expected to improve open rates, click rates, and course signups vs. the baseline parent-direct approach.

key_insights.title: Zero Campaign Activity — By Design, Not Inaction
key_insights.detail: All 9 sequences remained paused this period. 3,781 total executions, 64 opens (1.69%), and 0 clicks are unchanged from the baseline — confirming no sends occurred. This was intentional: deploying additional volume into the pre-pivot parent-direct messaging would have burned contacts before the gift-giver strategy was validated. The 623 contacts loaded into GifterCribIntent represent fresh, higher-quality targeting.

key_insights.title: Email Integration Disconnected — Single Active Blocker
key_insights.detail: The sender email needs to be reconnected in MMai before any sequence can execute. This is the only remaining blocker to go-live for the GifterCribIntent sequence. All other infrastructure is in place: 4-step sequence built, 623 contacts loaded, schedule configured, CTA aligned to free course signup.

key_insights.title: No Bookings Expected — Conversion Model Is Course Signup, Not Appointment
key_insights.detail: Unlike service-based MMai clients, Nearly Newborn's conversion path is: email → click → course landing page → free signup → paid upgrade. Booking metrics are not applicable. Success metrics going forward should focus on click-through rate to the course signup page and free-to-paid conversion tracking once that integration is built.

key_insights.title: 623 Gift-Intent Contacts + 1,117 Baby Prep Keywords — 1,740 Deployable
key_insights.detail: The GifterCribIntent sequence has 623 contacts loaded targeting the "Crib Mattress and Bedding" purchase-intent signal. The Baby Prep Keywords list (1,117 contacts) — flagged in Report #1 as the largest untapped pool — can be redirected toward the gift angle. Together, these represent 1,740 contacts ready for gift-focused engagement once the email blocker is resolved.

next_steps.detail: This is the single active blocker. Once the email integration is reconnected, the GifterCribIntent sequence can begin executing immediately.

next_steps.action: Activate GifterCribIntent sequence on reconnected email
next_steps.detail: Deploy NearlyNewborn_GifterCribIntent_Outreach_052326_v1 as the sole active campaign. Target: 623 contacts with gift-angle messaging. Expected to outperform baseline on opens, clicks, and course signups.

next_steps.action: Redirect Baby Prep Keywords list (1,117 contacts) to gift angle
next_steps.detail: Create a dedicated gift-focused sequence or merge into GifterCribIntent. This nearly doubles the deployable audience from 623 to 1,740.
Since bookings are not the conversion metric, set up click tracking to the course landing page and explore free-signup conversion tracking (UTM parameters or pixel).

By then, the email should be reconnected, the GifterCribIntent sequence should have 1+ weeks of engagement data, and we'll have the first period-over-period comparison with live gift-giver campaign metrics.
